flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Wagner College rose 19% between 2006 and 2009 ($27.3k → $32.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Wagner College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Wagner College rose 12% between 2006 and 2009 (60.8% → 67.9%).
